# Bundled ExifTool

- Version: 13.59, Windows 64-bit portable package
- Upstream: https://exiftool.org/
- Distribution: https://sourceforge.net/projects/exiftool/files/exiftool-13.59_64.zip/download
- Downloaded archive SHA-256: `44B512B25AF500724BA579D0A53C8FC5851628B692DD5E5D94AE4A15C2CBA9EC`
- Executable layout is preserved: `exiftool.exe` must remain beside `exiftool_files/`.

HOTELCUT invokes this executable read-only and sends UTF-8 media paths through an argument file.
